mapper.sql: p.profile_id, p.user_id, u.nick_name user_name, p.university, p.major, p.college_year, p.subjects, p.hourly_rate, p.availability_text, p.introduction, p.verify_status, p.verify_remark, p.student_card_url, p.qualification_url, p.create_time, p.update_time, (select count(*) from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = p.user_id and tm.status = '2') completed_orders, (select round(avg(tm.rating), 1) from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = p.user_id and tm.rating is not null) average_rating
mapper.select: select from tutor_profile p left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id where p.verify_status = '0' order by p.update_time asc, p.create_time asc

select from tutor_profile p left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id where p.verify_status = '1'
and p.subjects like concat('%', #{subjects}, '%')
and p.university like concat('%', #{university}, '%')
order by average_rating desc, completed_orders desc, p.update_time desc, p.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutor_profile (user_id, university, major, college_year, subjects, hourly_rate, introduction, availability_text, student_card_url, qualification_url, verify_status, create_by, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{university}, #{major}, #{collegeYear}, #{subjects}, #{hourlyRate}, #{introduction}, #{availabilityText}, #{studentCardUrl}, #{qualificationUrl}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutor_profile set university = #{university}, major = #{major}, college_year = #{collegeYear}, subjects = #{subjects}, hourly_rate = #{hourlyRate}, introduction = #{introduction}, availability_text = #{availabilityText}, student_card_url = #{studentCardUrl}, qualification_url = #{qualificationUrl}, verify_status = '0', verify_remark = '', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update tutor_profile set verify_status = #{verifyStatus}, verify_remark = #{verifyRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where profile_id = #{profileId} and verify_status = '0'
mapper.select: select learner_id, user_id, learner_name, grade, school, weak_subjects, target_score, available_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from tutoring_learner where user_id = #{userId} order by update_time desc, create_time desc, learner_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_learner (user_id, learner_name, grade, school, weak_subjects, target_score, available_time, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{learnerName}, #{grade}, #{school}, #{weakSubjects}, #{targetScore}, #{availableTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_learner set learner_name = #{learnerName}, grade = #{grade}, school = #{school}, weak_subjects = #{weakSubjects}, target_score = #{targetScore}, available_time = #{availableTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where learner_id = #{learnerId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from tutoring_learner where learner_id = #{learnerId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select availability_id, user_id, week_day, time_format(start_time, '%H:%i') start_time, time_format(end_time, '%H:%i') end_time, available_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from tutor_availability where user_id = #{userId} order by week_day asc, start_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into tutor_availability (user_id, week_day, start_time, end_time, available_status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, coalesce(#{availableStatus}, '1'), #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from tutor_availability where availability_id = #{availabilityId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select announcement_id, title, content, status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from tutoring_announcement where status = '1' order by publish_time desc, announcement_id desc

select announcement_id, title, content, status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from tutoring_announcement where 1 = 1
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by publish_time desc, announcement_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_announcement (title, content, status, publish_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, case when #{status} = '1' then sysdate() else null end, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_announcement set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, publish_time = case when #{status} = '1' and publish_time is null then sysdate() else publish_time end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where announcement_id = #{announcementId}
mapper.sql: r.request_id, r.publisher_id, u.nick_name publisher_name, r.learner_grade, r.subject, r.area, r.schedule_text, r.hourly_budget, r.requirement_text, r.status, r.create_time, r.update_time
mapper.select:
select from tutoring_request r left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.publisher_id where r.status = '0'
and r.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
and r.learner_grade like concat('%', #{learnerGrade}, '%')
and r.area like concat('%', #{area}, '%')
and r.hourly_budget >= #{minBudget}
and r.hourly_budget <= #{maxBudget}
order by r.create_time desc

select from tutoring_request r left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.publisher_id where 1 = 1
and r.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
and r.learner_grade like concat('%', #{learnerGrade}, '%')
and r.area like concat('%', #{area}, '%')
and r.status = #{status}
order by r.create_time desc

select u.user_id userId, u.user_name userName, u.nick_name nickName, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time createTime, concat('需求', count(distinct r.request_id), '，订单', count(distinct m.match_id), '，投诉', count(distinct c.complaint_id)) remark from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role ro on ro.role_id = ur.role_id and ro.role_key = 'client' left join tutoring_request r on r.publisher_id = u.user_id left join tutoring_match m on m.request_id = r.request_id left join tutoring_complaint c on c.complainant_id = u.user_id where u.del_flag = '0'
and (u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') or u.nick_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%'))
and u.status = #{status}
group by u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time order by u.create_time desc, u.user_id desc

select p.profile_id, u.user_id, u.nick_name user_name, u.user_name login_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status user_status, p.university, p.major, p.college_year, p.subjects, p.hourly_rate, p.availability_text, p.introduction, p.verify_status, p.verify_remark, p.student_card_url, p.qualification_url, p.create_time, p.update_time, (select count(*) from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = u.user_id and tm.status = '2') completed_orders, (select round(avg(tm.rating), 1) from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = u.user_id and tm.rating is not null) average_rating from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role ro on ro.role_id = ur.role_id and ro.role_key = 'tutor' left join tutor_profile p on p.user_id = u.user_id where u.del_flag = '0'
and (u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') or u.nick_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%'))
and p.university like concat('%', #{university}, '%')
and p.subjects like concat('%', #{subjects}, '%')
and p.verify_status = #{verifyStatus}
order by u.create_time desc, u.user_id desc

select count(1) from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role ro on ro.role_id = ur.role_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0' and ro.role_key in ('client', 'tutor')
select from tutoring_request r left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.publisher_id where r.publisher_id = #{publisherId} order by r.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_request (publisher_id, learner_grade, subject, area, schedule_text, hourly_budget, requirement_text, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{publisherId}, #{learnerGrade}, #{subject}, #{area}, #{scheduleText}, #{hourlyBudget}, #{requirementText}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_match set status = '4', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId} and status = '0'
mapper.sql: m.match_id, m.request_id, m.tutor_id, tutor.nick_name tutor_name, r.publisher_id, publisher.nick_name publisher_name, r.subject, m.quoted_rate, m.application_text, m.status, m.cancel_reason, m.reschedule_text, date_format(m.trial_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') trial_time, m.trial_remark, m.trial_status, m.rating, m.review_text, m.create_time, m.update_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_match m join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where m.match_id = #{matchId}

select from tutoring_match m join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where m.tutor_id = #{userId} or r.publisher_id = #{userId} order by m.create_time desc

select from tutoring_match m join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where 1 = 1
and r.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
and m.status = #{status}
order by m.create_time desc

select from tutoring_invitation i left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = i.publisher_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = i.tutor_id where 1 = 1
and i.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
and i.status = #{status}
order by i.create_time desc

select l.lesson_id, l.match_id, r.subject, publisher.nick_name publisher_name, tutor.nick_name tutor_name, l.lesson_date, l.hours, l.content, l.amount, l.confirm_status, l.student_performance, l.homework, l.next_plan, l.confirm_by, l.confirm_time, l.create_by, l.create_time from tutoring_lesson l join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = l.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id where 1 = 1
and r.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
order by l.lesson_date desc, l.lesson_id desc
select count(1) from tutoring_match where request_id = #{requestId} and tutor_id = #{tutorId}
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_match (request_id, tutor_id, quoted_rate, application_text, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{requestId}, #{tutorId}, #{quotedRate}, #{applicationText}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_match set trial_time = #{trialTime}, trial_remark = #{trialRemark}, trial_status = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where match_id = #{matchId} and status = '1'
update tutoring_match set trial_status = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where match_id = #{matchId} and status = '1' and trial_status = '1'
update tutoring_match set status = '3', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where request_id = #{requestId} and match_id != #{acceptedMatchId} and status = '0'
update tutoring_match set rating = #{rating}, review_text = #{reviewText}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where match_id = #{matchId} and status = '2' and rating is null
mapper.select: select count(*) totalRequests, coalesce(sum(status = '0'), 0) openRequests, coalesce(sum(status in ('1', '2')), 0) matchedRequests, coalesce(sum(status = '2'), 0) completedRequests, coalesce(round(sum(status in ('1', '2')) * 100.0 / nullif(count(*), 0), 1), 0) matchRate, (select count(*) from tutor_profile where verify_status = '1') verifiedTutors, coalesce((select round(avg(rating), 1) from tutoring_match where rating is not null), 0) averageRating from tutoring_request
select subject, count(*) requestCount from tutoring_request group by subject order by requestCount desc, subject asc limit 5

select (select count(1) from tutor_profile where verify_status = '0') pendingProfiles, (select count(1) from tutoring_complaint where status = '0') pendingComplaints, (select count(1) from tutoring_match where status = '1' and datediff(sysdate(), create_time) >= 7) staleMatches, (select count(1) from tutoring_lesson where confirm_status = '0') unconfirmedLessons, (select count(1) from tutoring_settlement where status = '0') pendingSettlements, (select count(1) from tutoring_ticket where status = '0') pendingTickets

select lesson_id, match_id, lesson_date, hours, content, amount, student_performance, homework, next_plan, confirm_status, confirm_by, confirm_time, create_by, create_time from tutoring_lesson where match_id = #{matchId} order by lesson_date desc, lesson_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_lesson (match_id, lesson_date, hours, content, amount, student_performance, homework, next_plan, confirm_status, create_by, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{lessonDate}, #{hours}, #{content}, #{amount}, #{studentPerformance}, #{homework}, #{nextPlan}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_lesson set confirm_status = '1', confirm_by = #{confirmBy}, confirm_time = sysdate() where lesson_id = #{lessonId} and match_id = #{matchId} and confirm_status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert ignore into tutoring_settlement (lesson_id, match_id, tutor_id, amount, status, create_time) select l.lesson_id, l.match_id, m.tutor_id, l.amount, '0', sysdate() from tutoring_lesson l join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = l.match_id where l.lesson_id = #{lessonId} and l.confirm_status = '1'
mapper.sql: s.settlement_id, s.lesson_id, s.match_id, s.tutor_id, tutor.nick_name tutor_name, publisher.nick_name publisher_name, r.subject, s.amount, s.status, s.settle_by, s.settle_time, s.create_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_settlement s join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = s.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = s.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where s.tutor_id = #{tutorId} order by s.create_time desc, s.settlement_id desc

select from tutoring_settlement s join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = s.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = s.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where 1 = 1
and s.status = #{status}
and r.subject like concat('%', #{subject}, '%')
order by s.status asc, s.create_time desc, s.settlement_id desc

select from tutoring_settlement s join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = s.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = s.tutor_id left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = r.publisher_id where s.settlement_id = #{settlementId}
mapper.update: update tutoring_settlement set status = '1', settle_by = #{settleBy}, settle_time = sysdate() where settlement_id = #{settlementId} and status = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from tutoring_lesson where match_id = #{matchId} and confirm_status = '1'

select m.material_id, m.match_id, m.uploader_id, u.nick_name uploader_name, m.title, m.file_url, m.remark, m.create_by, m.create_time from tutoring_material m left join sys_user u on u.user_id = m.uploader_id where m.match_id = #{matchId} order by m.create_time desc, m.material_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_material (match_id, uploader_id, title, file_url, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{uploaderId}, #{title}, #{fileUrl}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select msg.message_id, msg.match_id, msg.sender_id, u.nick_name sender_name, msg.content, msg.create_by, msg.create_time from tutoring_message msg left join sys_user u on u.user_id = msg.sender_id where msg.match_id = #{matchId} order by msg.create_time asc, msg.message_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_message (match_id, sender_id, content, create_by, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.sql: p.payment_id, p.match_id, p.payer_id, payer.nick_name payer_name, tutor.nick_name tutor_name, r.subject, p.amount, p.proof_url, p.remark, p.status, p.handle_remark, p.handle_by, p.handle_time, p.create_by, p.create_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_payment p join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = p.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user payer on payer.user_id = p.payer_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id where p.match_id = #{matchId} order by p.create_time desc, p.payment_id desc

select from tutoring_payment p join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = p.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user payer on payer.user_id = p.payer_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = m.tutor_id where p.payment_id = #{paymentId}
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_payment (match_id, payer_id, amount, proof_url, remark, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{payerId}, #{amount}, #{proofUrl}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_payment set status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_by = #{handleBy}, handle_time = sysdate() where payment_id = #{paymentId} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_followup (match_id, content, next_action, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{content}, #{nextAction}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
insert into tutoring_notification (user_id, title, content, read_status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.update: update tutoring_notification set read_status = '1' where notification_id = #{notificationId} and user_id = #{userId}
update tutoring_notification set read_status = '1' where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from tutoring_notification where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0'
select tutor_id from tutoring_match where request_id = #{requestId} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert ignore into tutoring_complaint (match_id, complainant_id, reason, status, create_time) values (#{matchId}, #{complainantId}, #{reason}, '0', sysdate())
insert into tutoring_complaint_log (complaint_id, action_text, create_by, create_time) values (#{complaintId}, #{actionText}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.sql: c.complaint_id, c.match_id, c.complainant_id, u.nick_name complainant_name, r.subject, c.reason, c.status, c.handle_remark, c.handle_by, (select group_concat(concat(date_format(l.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), ' ', l.create_by, ': ', l.action_text) order by l.create_time separator ' / ') from tutoring_complaint_log l where l.complaint_id = c.complaint_id) handle_timeline, c.create_time, c.update_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_complaint c join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = c.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.complainant_id where c.complainant_id = #{userId} order by c.create_time desc

select from tutoring_complaint c join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = c.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.complainant_id order by c.status asc, c.create_time desc

select from tutoring_complaint c join tutoring_match m on m.match_id = c.match_id join tutoring_request r on r.request_id = m.request_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.complainant_id where c.complaint_id = #{complaintId}
mapper.update: update tutoring_complaint set status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_by = #{handleBy}, update_time = sysdate() where complaint_id = #{complaintId} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_ticket (user_id, title, content, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.sql: t.ticket_id, t.user_id, u.nick_name user_name, t.title, t.content, t.status, t.handle_remark, t.handle_by, t.create_time, t.update_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_ticket t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.user_id where t.user_id = #{userId} order by t.create_time desc, t.ticket_id desc

select from tutoring_ticket t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.user_id where 1 = 1
and t.status = #{status}
and t.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by t.status asc, t.create_time desc, t.ticket_id desc
select from tutoring_ticket t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.user_id where t.ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.update: update tutoring_ticket set status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_by = #{handleBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ticket_id = #{ticketId} and status = '0'
mapper.select: select , least(100, case when p.subjects like concat('%', r.subject, '%') then 45 else 0 end + case when r.hourly_budget >= p.hourly_rate then 20 else 5 end + coalesce((select round(avg(tm.rating), 0) * 4 from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = p.user_id and tm.rating is not null), 0) + least(15, (select count(1) from tutoring_match tm where tm.tutor_id = p.user_id and tm.status = '2') * 3) + case when datediff(sysdate(), r.create_time) <= 7 then 10 else 0 end) match_score from tutoring_request r left join sys_user u on u.user_id = r.publisher_id join tutor_profile p on p.user_id = #{tutorId} and p.verify_status = '1' where r.status = '0' and not exists (select 1 from tutoring_match m where m.request_id = r.request_id and m.tutor_id = #{tutorId}) order by match_score desc, r.create_time desc limit 20
mapper.insert: insert ignore into tutor_favorite (user_id, tutor_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{tutorId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from tutor_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and tutor_id = #{tutorId}
mapper.select: select from tutor_favorite f join tutor_profile p on p.user_id = f.tutor_id and p.verify_status = '1' left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tutoring_invitation (publisher_id, tutor_id, learner_grade, subject, area, schedule_text, offered_rate, message, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{publisherId}, #{tutorId}, #{learnerGrade}, #{subject}, #{area}, #{scheduleText}, #{offeredRate}, #{message}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.sql: i.invitation_id, i.publisher_id, publisher.nick_name publisher_name, i.tutor_id, tutor.nick_name tutor_name, i.learner_grade, i.subject, i.area, i.schedule_text, i.offered_rate, i.message, i.status, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_time
mapper.select: select from tutoring_invitation i left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = i.publisher_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = i.tutor_id where i.publisher_id = #{userId} or i.tutor_id = #{userId} order by i.create_time desc
select from tutoring_invitation i left join sys_user publisher on publisher.user_id = i.publisher_id left join sys_user tutor on tutor.user_id = i.tutor_id where i.invitation_id = #{invitationId}
mapper.update: update tutoring_invitation set status = #{target}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where invitation_id = #{invitationId} and status = '0'
